jcr:title: Scientist Spotlights | The People Powering AbbVie R&D | AbbVie
jcr:description: Meet AbbVie scientists driving discovery through collaboration, persistence and purpose. See how their passion is shaping the future of medicine.

text_container_text.text:
Science is only as bold as the people who drive it.

Meet the scientists turning curiosity into therapies, working together across disciplines and pushing through challenges that aim to deliver scientific breakthroughs.
text_container_text.name: Text Container Text

brightcove_video.overlayHeading: Evan Jian He on scientific ideas and teamwork

custom_title.title: How our scientists drive research and innovation further

text_container_text.text: See how Evan's work with the Operations team is fueled by rigor and resolve to turn small insights into scientific breakthroughs.
text_container_text.name: Text Container Text

brightcove_video.captionDescription: In-Ho in Clinical Development, Immunology shares how staying true to purpose and leading with curiosity helps transform challenges into opportunities for progress.
brightcove_video.name: Brightcove Video
brightcove_video.captionHeading: In-Ho Song on Science and Resilience

brightcove_video.captionDescription: Caro in Medical Affairs + Health Impact, Immunology explains how bold strategy, cross-functional collaboration and relentless focus on patients help shape AbbVie’s approach to scientific innovation.
brightcove_video.name: Brightcove Video
brightcove_video.captionHeading: Caro Park on Leadership and Innovation

brightcove_video.captionDescription: Jorge in Medical Affairs + Health Impact, Neuroscience reflects on the importance of failure – and persistence – in advancing discovery.
brightcove_video.name: Brightcove Video
brightcove_video.captionHeading: Jorge Zamudio on Pursuing Challenging Science for Patients

brightcove_video.captionDescription: Kim in Clinical Development Operations explains how a problem solving mindset helps tackle challenges and deliver for patients.
brightcove_video.name: Brightcove Video

brightcove_video.captionDescription: Ambily in Discovery Research shares how purpose and collaboration fuel early discovery and why she thrives in an environment where science meets purpose.
brightcove_video.name: Brightcove Video
brightcove_video.captionHeading: Ambily Abraham on Discovery through Collaboration

text_container_text.text: From quick insights to in-depth stories, explore how our scientists and the use of new modalities and technologies are helping shape the future of medicine.
